zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise de Briwere於1130年出生在英國戴文斯托克 達莫勒爾時，她的父親Robert de Briwere27歲，母親Joan Vernon de Reviers23歲。她於大約1143年與Lambert de Multon I在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1166年在英國林可爾史爾莫爾頓享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise de Briwere于1130年出生在英国戴文斯托克 達莫勒爾时，她的父亲Robert de Briwere27岁，母亲Joan Vernon de Reviers23岁。她于大约1143年与Lambert de Multon I在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1166年在英国林可爾史爾莫爾頓享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Briwere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Pierre, Adrien, Aurele, Benedicte, Benoit, Colette, Fernand, Gaston, Marcel, Micheline.

French (Brière): topographic name from a regional variant of Old French bruiere ‘heather’ (see Bruyere ), or a habitational name from La Brière, the name of several places mainly in the northern part of France, from the same word.
History: Jean Brière from Clarbec in Calvados, France, married Jeanne Grandin in Quebec City, QC, in 1671.

variants.name: Bruyere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Fernand, Jacques, Marcel.

French (Bruyère): from Old French bruiere ‘heather’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived in a place where heather grew, or a habitational name from one of the places in France (for example in Calvados) named with this word. Compare Labruyere .
Altered form (Bruyère) of French Bruguier: habitational name from (Le) Bruguier, the name of several places in the southeastern part of France, a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise de Briwere was born in 1130, in Stoke Damerel, Devon, England, her father, Robert de Briwere, was 27 and her mother, Joan Vernon de Reviers, was 23. She married Lambert de Multon I about 1143, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1166, in Moulton, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise de Briwere est née en 1130, à Stoke Damerel, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Briwere, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan Vernon de Reviers, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Lambert de Multon I environ 1143, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1166, à Moulton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise de Briwere 1130 in Stoke Damerel, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Briwere 27 und ihre Mutter Joan Vernon de Reviers 23. Sie hat um 1143 in Lincolnshire, England Lambert de Multon I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1166 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Moulton, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise de Briwereが1130年にイギリスデボンストク ダムレルで生まれた時，父Robert de Briwereは27歳，母Joan Vernon de Reviersは23歳であった。約1143年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでLambert de Multon Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1166年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアモウルトンで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de Briwere(이)가 1130년 영국 데폰 스토크 다머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Briwere(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Vernon de Reviers(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1143년 영국 링코실르에서 Lambert de Multon I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1166년 영국 링코실르 모우턴에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Briwere nasceu em 1130, em Stoke Damerel, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Briwere, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan Vernon de Reviers, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Lambert de Multon I aproximadamente 1143, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1166, em Moulton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 36 anos.

ro.Stoke Damerel, Devon, England: Stoke Damerel, Devon, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise de Briwere родилась в 1130 г. в местности сток дэмирэл, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Briwere было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Vernon de Reviers, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lambert de Multon I около 1143 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1166 г. в местности моултон, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 36 лет.

Murió en 1166, en Moulton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años.
